curation_rule: one post-2018 arXiv ID per side per pair; both sides must be in corpus for evaluable=true
verification_note: All arXiv IDs verified via export.arxiv.org API on 2026-04-20

pairs.description: Modern Hopfield networks (dense Hebbian) ↔ p-spin spherical spin glass

side_a.title: Hopfield Networks is All You Need
side_a.notes: Shows modern dense Hopfield networks are equivalent to attention; directly connects to p-spin models

side_b.title: Dense Hopfield Networks in the Teacher-Student Setting
side_b.notes: Analyzes phase diagram of p-body Hopfield networks as spin glasses; paramagnetic-to-spin-glass transition; bridges dense Hopfield/attention with p-spin physics

pairs.description: Kuramoto oscillator mathematics ↔ brain network synchronization (fMRI)

side_a.title: Synchronization of coupled Kuramoto oscillators competing for resources
side_a.notes: Extends Kuramoto to resource-constrained networks; Bassett lab bridges to neuroscience

side_b.title: Kuramoto model based analysis reveals oxytocin effects on brain network dynamics
side_b.notes: Applies Kuramoto phase dynamics to fMRI data; direct biological validation

pairs.description: Random matrix theory (spectral fluctuations) ↔ neural tangent kernel theory

side_a.title: Fluctuations of the spectrum in rotationally invariant random matrix ensembles
side_a.notes: Rigorous spectral statistics for large random matrices; Marchenko-Pastur / semicircle foundations

side_b.title: Random Features for the Neural Tangent Kernel
side_b.notes: Applies random matrix spectral theory to construct efficient NTK approximations

pairs.description: Topological data analysis ↔ topological phase transitions in condensed matter

side_a.title: giotto-tda: A Topological Data Analysis Toolkit for Machine Learning and Data Exploration
side_a.notes: Implements persistent homology for data analysis; widely cited TDA toolkit

side_b.title: Learning quantum phase transitions through Topological Data Analysis
side_b.notes: Applies TDA/persistent homology to detect quantum phase transitions in 2D Anderson and Hubbard models; Monte Carlo + TDA pipeline; critical points agree with literature

pairs.description: Stochastic thermodynamics (entropy production / Jarzynski) ↔ diffusion generative models

side_a.title: Information thermodynamics: from physics to neuroscience
side_a.notes: Applies fluctuation theorems and free energy bounds to neural inference

side_b.title: Denoising Diffusion Variational Inference: Diffusion Models as Expressive Variational Posteriors
side_b.notes: Reverse-time SDEs as variational posteriors; explicitly connects to Jarzynski free-energy bounds

pairs.description: SIR epidemic spreading on networks ↔ information/awareness diffusion on multiplex networks

side_a.title: The Effects of Diffusion of Information on Epidemic Spread -- A Multilayer Approach
side_a.notes: Coupled SIR and information-adoption dynamics on two-layer networks

side_b.title: The impact of nodes of information dissemination on epidemic spreading in dynamic multiplex networks
side_b.notes: Information awareness in one layer suppresses disease in another; isomorphic spreading dynamics
